shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "downshift aria-selected getItemProps useCombobox useSelect boolean string" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,335p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '395,480p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && sed -n '1,80p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && sed -n '1,75p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && rg -n \"aria-selected\" src | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && rg -n \"'aria-selected':.*\\"'`|aria-selected.*'"\\"'$'"\\{\" src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Downshift aria-selected returned boolean useCombobox useSelect" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "Downshift useCombobox and useSelect getItemProps now return boolean aria-selected values directly from their comparisons. The prior template-literal coercion produced truthy string values; DOM aria-selected serialization remains unchanged. Focused regression assertions and the full Jest suite pass." -t "Downshift aria-selected props are booleans" --unit-type learning -l label_downshift -l label_aria -s codex -i 0.7'
